sections.description: Installation scripts for lil-olt-metrics. Includes a universal install script that downloads pre-built binaries from GitHub releases, plus legacy platform-specific scripts that build from source.
sections.purpose: Provide one-command installation for lil-olt-metrics. The primary install.sh downloads pre-built binaries from GH releases, auto-detects OS/arch, and sets up the system service. The legacy install-linux.sh and install-darwin.sh build from source and require Go.
strengths: install.sh requires no Go toolchain — downloads pre-built binaries
Auto-detects OS and architecture for a single curl | bash command
Supports pinning to a specific version via --version or LOM_VERSION env var
All scripts use set -euo pipefail for strict error handling
Idempotent: existing services are stopped before reinstalling, configs are preserved
Linux systemd unit includes hardening directives (NoNewPrivileges, ProtectSystem, ProtectHome, PrivateTmp)
weaknesses: Darwin launchd daemon runs as root (no dedicated user)
No checksum or signature verification of downloaded binaries
sections.test_coverage: No tests. Operational scripts without automated test coverage.
sections.dependencies: install.sh: curl, root/sudo privileges. install-linux.sh/install-darwin.sh: Go toolchain, root/sudo, repository source tree.
functionality: install.sh: Download pre-built binary from GitHub releases for the detected OS/arch
install.sh: Resolve latest version via GitHub API, or accept --version flag
install.sh: Set up systemd service (Linux) or launchd daemon (macOS)
install.sh: Write default config.yaml if not present, preserving existing configs
install.sh: --no-service flag to skip service registration (binary-only install)
install.sh: Stop/unload existing service before reinstalling
install-linux.sh: Build from source and install as systemd service (legacy)
install-darwin.sh: Build from source and install as launchd daemon (legacy)
sections.files:
| File | Description |
|---|---|
| install.sh | Universal install script — downloads pre-built binary from GH releases, detects OS/arch, sets up system service |
| install-linux.sh | Legacy script — builds from source and installs as Linux systemd service |
| install-darwin.sh | Legacy script — builds from source and installs as macOS launchd daemon |
